description: Handles the lifecycle of a borrow request, assigning it to the Librarians group, generating approvals, updating book counts upon approval, and sending user notifications.

actions.description: Ensure the assignment group is set to Librarians.
Request approval from the Librarian assignment group.

subActions.description: Transition borrow request status to Borrowed, set approval date and calculate due date.
Notify student that their request was approved.

inputs.subject: Approved: Borrow Request for Book: [Book Title]
inputs.body:
Hello [Student Name],

Your borrow request has been approved. You can collect your book from the library counter.
Due Date: [Due Date]

Regards,
Library Admin

subActions.description: Notify student that their request was rejected.

inputs.subject: Rejected: Borrow Request for Book: [Book Title]
inputs.body:
Hello [Student Name],

We regret to inform you that your request to borrow [Book Title] has been rejected.
Librarian Comments: [Librarian Comments]

Regards,
Library Admin
